use_cases: Displaying rotating customer testimonials in a continuous scrolling banner
Showcasing brand logos or partner logos in a marquee format
Creating a dynamic testimonial carousel with auto-scrolling animation
Building a vertical scrolling ticker for news or announcements
Adding visual interest to landing pages with animated content blocks
ai_summary: A flexible marquee/ticker component for displaying testimonials or content in a continuous scrolling animation. Supports horizontal and vertical directions, configurable animation speed and repetition, with options to pause on hover. Built with Tailwind CSS using a flat, minimalist visual approach suitable for various industries including SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms. Fully responsive and accessible with ARIA support.
